title: selaginella trygonoides
intro: Selaginella trygonoides, also known as the dragon's blood tree, is a type of pteridophyte, or vascular cryptogam, a group of plants that produce seeds but reproduce via spores. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and wounds, due to its high content of resins and essential oils. The health benefits of Selaginella trygonoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote tissue repair, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's resin is often extracted and used in topical creams, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
